S.FORM: Ken Bannister sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 4, Ken Bannister, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: ken Œ≤annis~…ïter s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj * nqu taj *, ken Œ≤annis~…ïter, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï)
